svg.title: Umang Dhawan — technology consultant and open-source product builder
svg.desc: An editorial masthead in ink, slate, and gold. The left column carries the name and focus areas; a catalogue panel on the right lists four shipped products as numbered specimens.

g.text: I turn complex ideas into reliable systems that ship.

svg.title: Orifold — paper folds into an origami crane, then the app icon
FolioOrb animated orbit mark
svg.desc: A portfolio orbit logo with a slowly moving satellite and pulsing center.

svg.title: GOLAVO
svg.desc: A sumi brushstroke ball trajectory draws the letter G and curls into the top corner of a minimal goal under a rising gold sun, above a drifting seigaiha wave ground. Loops every 6.5s; honors prefers-reduced-motion with the composed static frame.

svg.title: Voyalier app icon
svg.desc: The folded-route mark — a vermilion waypoint trace draws down through the fold and arrives with a pulse — embossed on a deep indigo tile. Loops every 6s; honors prefers-reduced-motion.
